prerequisites: A Simplesat account with access to Settings -> API keys (administrative access is required to create API keys).
A Simplesat API key with the scopes needed to read the data you intend to extract (for example survey responses and answers).
Optional: a start_date and/or end_date to bound the time range of records the source pulls.

authMethods.name: API key (X-Simplesat-Token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a single Simplesat API key, supplied via the connector's secret api_key field. Simplesat's public v1 API authenticates each request by passing the key in the X-Simplesat-Token request header. Keys are created in the Simplesat app under Settings -> API keys and can be granted Full access (all current and future scopes) or Custom (only the scopes you select).

setupSteps.title: Create a Simplesat API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Simplesat and go to Settings -> API keys. Create a new API key and choose its permissions: Full access grants all current and future scopes, or Custom grants only the scopes you select. Make sure the key has the scopes required to read the data you want to extract. Copy the key value, since it is the credential the connector uses.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's api_key field (a secret) to the Simplesat API key you created. The connector authenticates to Simplesat's v1 API by sending this key in the X-Simplesat-Token header on every request.

setupSteps.title: Optionally bound the sync window
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date and/or end_date to limit extraction to records within that time range. Both fields are optional; leave them unset to use the connector's default range.

sources.title: API keys management | Simplesat help center
